content:
Alert Name: ArcGIS down

Root cause: AppGw backend pool(s) empty

STEPS

ACTION

ADDITIONAL COMMENTS

Connect to the AKS cluster

Refer to Prerequisites for ‘Cluster Connection Cmd’



Check Application Gateway backend health in Azure Portal

In the https://hexsig.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/CT/pages/156893374/Reference+Guide#Azure-Portal , search and select the Application Gateway. To Get the Application Gateway name refer to Prerequisites impacted resources.

Application Gateway > Overview>Settings > Backend pools 

Check if IP exists in the backend pool , Get the backend pool name from Prerequisites impacted resources.

Review the backend pool and validate the registered IP addresses.If IP exists in backend Pool, stop the respone plan execution.

Rollout the ingress pod

kubectl rollout restart deploy ingress-azure -n default

This forces the Ingress Controller to refresh backend pool registration with updated service IPs.

Check Azure Ingress pod logs
